name: Research and Education Network for Uganda (RENU)
notes:
Research and Education Network for Uganda (RENU) is Uganda’s National Research and Education Network (NREN). RENU is a not-for-profit member-based organization, whose major goal is to uplift the quality of research and education through the provision of high-speed Internet and a wide range of affordable ICT solutions to Research and Education (R&E) institutions.

By providing affordable solutions to R&E institutions, we enable our member institutions to overcome the traditionally high costs of information and knowledge sharing and exchange thereby enabling seamless collaboration among them and their peers nationally and globally.
